command.mythos.set_target_myth: Changed the myth of %s player(s) to %s.
command.mythos.force_choose: Opened the myth selection screen for %s.
command.mythos.open_guide: Opened the Tome of Mythos for %s.
command.mythos.taildebug_given: Tail tuner granted. J/L = X, I/K = Y, U/O = Z, 7/9 = RX, 4/6 = RY, 1/3 = RZ, [/] = step, P = reset, H = show.
message.mythos.choose_prompt: Choose a myth to continue playing.
message.mythos.myth_sphere_used: The Myth Sphere shattered, and you must choose a myth again.
message.mythos.smithing_locked: You cannot forge this item with your current myth.
message.mythos.elf_only_forge: Only elves can forge the Elven Bow.
message.mythos.dwarf_only_tempering: Only dwarves can temper an enchanted pickaxe with a netherite ingot.
myth.mythos.kitsune.growth: 1.8 blocks. Night form does not change the base height.
myth.mythos.oni.growth: 1.8 blocks normally and 2.7 blocks in battle form.
myth.mythos.player.growth: Mythos does not lock this height: it can be adjusted manually through commands or other effects.
myth.mythos.human.description: A flexible myth of towns and villages that shines brightest through trade and reputation.
myth.mythos.human.advantage.heroic_reput: Constantly keeps Hero of the Village V and pushes villager prices to about 20% of their base cost.
myth.mythos.human.advantage.extended_tra: Temporarily gains twice the trade stock while dealing with villagers.
myth.mythos.human.advantage.trade_insigh: Sees the remaining stock of the selected trade.
myth.mythos.human.disadvantage.village_d: Its strongest advantages only matter around villages and villagers.
myth.mythos.human.guide.feature.full_hei: Humans keep the standard height of about 2 blocks, with no racial model changes.
myth.mythos.human.guide.feature.heroic_r: Humans constantly maintain Hero of the Village V and also push most deals to about 20% of their base price, making village trade especially efficient.
myth.mythos.human.guide.feature.extended: When a human trades with a villager, each offer temporarily gets double stock: 16 uses become 32, 12 become 24, and so on.
myth.mythos.human.guide.feature.trade_in: Inside the trade screen, a human can see how many uses remain on the selected offer. This makes it easier to squeeze the exact trade you need before it locks.
myth.mythos.human.guide.crafting.mythos_: The Tome of Mythos is crafted from a book and lapis lazuli. This is the basic way to make another copy of the myth guide.
myth.mythos.elf.description: A forest myth built around grace, keen archery, and access to elven forging.
myth.mythos.elf.advantage.forest_stride: Gain Speed I in forest biomes and cherry groves.
myth.mythos.elf.advantage.elven_bow_forg: Can forge the Elven Bow with improved drops.
myth.mythos.elf.guide.feature.full_heigh: Elves keep the standard height of about 2 blocks, without changing the player model.
myth.mythos.elf.guide.feature.forest_str: Elves gain Speed I in forest, flower forest, birch forest, old growth birch forest, dark forest, taiga, old growth pine taiga, old growth spruce taiga, and cherry grove.
myth.mythos.elf.guide.feature.archery_ma: Bows and arrows deal 35% more damage, while axes deal 30% less.
myth.mythos.elf.guide.feature.ale_reacti: Elves can drink dwarven ale, but it leaves them nauseous.
myth.mythos.elf.guide.crafting.elven_bow: At a smithing table, an elf can temper a bow with a netherite ingot to forge an Elven Bow with stronger drops.
myth.mythos.dwarf.description: A stone-bred master of the mines who stands shorter, digs faster, and works best with a beer close at hand.
myth.mythos.dwarf.advantage.runic_temper: Can temper pickaxe enchantments in a smithing table with a netherite ingot.
myth.mythos.dwarf.disadvantage.ale_depen: Without ale, becomes heavily slowed, and after 5 minutes also suffers Blindness.
myth.mythos.dwarf.guide.feature.compact_: Dwarves stand lower than normal players and settle at 1.35 blocks tall.
myth.mythos.dwarf.guide.feature.stone_st: Dwarves constantly keep Haste I, and below Y=0 it strengthens into Haste II. The effect is always visible in the active effects list.
myth.mythos.dwarf.guide.feature.runic_te: An enchanted pickaxe can be tempered with a netherite ingot to raise ordinary enchantment levels by 1, but only once.
myth.mythos.dwarf.guide.feature.ale_depe: Without the Ale Spirit effect, a dwarf gains a separate visible Ale Sluggishness (Slowness II) status and becomes noticeably slower. First, an Ale Withdrawal effect shows the countdown to the second stage. After 5 minutes without ale, it changes into Acute Ale Withdrawal and Blindness starts stacking on top.
myth.mythos.dwarf.guide.crafting.dwarven: Dwarven ale is brewed from a honey bottle and two wheat. The honey bottle is fully consumed by the recipe, while drinking the ale itself still returns an empty glass bottle.
myth.mythos.dwarf.guide.crafting.tempere: Pickaxe tempering only works for dwarves: place an enchanted pickaxe and a netherite ingot into the smithing table.
myth.mythos.fairy.description: A tiny airy myth with two manual flight modes, a flower diet, and full elytra wings instead of chest armor.
myth.mythos.fairy.advantage.low_flight: In free-flight mode, can fly while the nearest solid block is within 5 blocks in any direction, and outside that zone only drifts down gently.
myth.mythos.fairy.advantage.flower_diet: Can eat any flower, including the wither rose: +2 hunger and +0.1 saturation.
myth.mythos.fairy.advantage.wind_artifac: Can forge Fairy Boots with Speed I and a Fairy Minecart from wind charges.
myth.mythos.fairy.advantage.shared_visio: Can grant Night Vision within 5 blocks for 3 minutes with a 30-second cooldown.
myth.mythos.fairy.disadvantage.fragile_b: Maximum health is cut in half.
myth.mythos.fairy.disadvantage.bound_win: The chest slot is occupied by Fairy Wings and cannot hold armor.
myth.mythos.fairy.disadvantage.melee_wea: Melee weapon damage is reduced by 30%.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.feature.tiny_fra: Fairies shrink to 0.9 blocks tall, making them visibly smaller than most myths.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.feature.low_flig: Press %s to manually switch between two flight modes. In free-flight mode, a fairy can fly while the nearest solid support is within 5 blocks in any direction, and outside that zone it only drifts down gently like Slow Falling. In elytra mode, the fairy uses full vanilla elytra flight. Pressing Shift near support disables elytra mode and returns it to free flight.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.feature.flower_d: Any flower held in hand, including the wither rose, can be eaten by a fairy as simple food. Each flower restores 2 hunger and 0.1 saturation, exactly like sweet berries.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.feature.wind_art: With a wind charge, fairies can forge two artifacts in the smithing table: Fairy Boots that grant Speed I while worn, and a Fairy Minecart that removes the usual speed cap from powered rails.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.feature.shared_v: By pressing %s, a fairy grants Night Vision to all players within 5 blocks for 3 minutes. The ability then goes on a 30-second cooldown.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.crafting.fairy_b: Fairy Boots can only be forged by fairies: place any boots and a wind charge into the smithing table.
myth.mythos.fairy.guide.crafting.fairy_m: The Fairy Minecart can only be forged by fairies: place a normal minecart and a wind charge into the smithing table.
myth.mythos.kitsune.description: A fox myth of trickery and night hunting: it dons a mask after dusk, slips away with a dash, hurls foxfire, and forges mystical artifacts.
myth.mythos.femboy_kitsune.description: A hidden personal kitsune variant with an extra ability to turn an empty bucket into special milk when used into the air.
myth.mythos.arch_fairy.description: A hidden personal fairy variant that can shrink itself to a truly tiny size at the press of a key and gain Speed I in that form.
myth.mythos.kitsune.advantage.night_mask: At night the mask grants Night Vision and invisibility while sneaking.
myth.mythos.kitsune.advantage.fox_dash: Fox Dash has an 8-second cooldown and Foxfire has a 4-second cooldown.
myth.mythos.kitsune.advantage.fox_lanter: Can forge a Fox Lantern that pulls hostile mobs from 18 blocks away.
myth.mythos.kitsune.disadvantage.day_mas: During the day, the mask and tails become visual only and grant no night powers.
myth.mythos.kitsune.disadvantage.melee_w: Melee weapon damage is reduced by 30%.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.feature.full_h: The kitsune keeps the standard 2-block height. It has clear fox ears and a large tail, and at night small foxfires begin to orbit around the mask.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.feature.night_: Press %s to show or hide the kitsune mask and tails together. During the day this is purely visual, while at night or in dimensions without daylight the mask also grants Night Vision and invisibility while sneaking.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.feature.foxfir: Pressing %s launches foxfire only while the mask is active and its night powers are awake. The ability has a 4-second cooldown.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.feature.fox_da: Press %s to dash sharply in the direction you are looking, including upward. This works during the day as well, and the cooldown is 8 seconds.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.feature.heaven: While masked, the first successful melee strike calls down Heavenly Wrath: lightning hits the target. After triggering, the effect goes on a 12-second cooldown.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.feature.fox_la: Kitsune can forge a Fox Lantern for other players. Once placed, it pulls nearby hostile mobs from an 18-block radius once per second and helps build traps and mob farms.
myth.mythos.kitsune.guide.crafting.fox_l: The Fox Lantern can only be forged by kitsune: place a lantern and a glow ink sac into the smithing table. Once placed, it pulls hostile mobs toward itself every second from 18 blocks away.
myth.mythos.siren.description: A myth of the deep sea: breathes underwater forever, swims swiftly, and must keep close to water even while walking on land.
myth.mythos.siren.advantage.water_breath: While in water, permanently gains Water Breathing and Night Vision.
myth.mythos.siren.advantage.swift_swim: While in water, permanently gains Dolphin's Grace.
myth.mythos.siren.advantage.siren_elixir: Can prepare a Siren Elixir from a water bottle and nautilus shell.
myth.mythos.siren.disadvantage.dry_land: Uses a 15-second air bar on land and then takes 1 heart of drying damage per second.
myth.mythos.siren.guide.feature.full_hei: The siren keeps a standard player height of about 2 blocks, without changing the base model.
myth.mythos.siren.guide.feature.water_br: Underwater, the siren permanently gains Water Breathing and Night Vision, so it never loses air like a normal player and can always see clearly in the deep.
myth.mythos.siren.guide.feature.swift_sw: In water, the siren permanently gains Dolphin's Grace, making oceans, rivers, and underwater ruins its natural territory.
myth.mythos.siren.guide.feature.dry_land: On land, the siren uses an inverted 15-second air meter: its bubbles tick down while walking in the dry. Once the meter empties, it starts taking 1 heart of drying damage per second. A regular water bottle instantly refills the full air bar. Marine enchantments also flip with it: Respiration I/II/III slows drying by 2x/3x/4x, Depth Strider I gives Land Sluggishness (Slowness II), Depth Strider II gives Land Sluggishness (Slowness I), and Depth Strider III removes land slowness completely. Without Aqua Affinity, the siren receives normal Mining Fatigue I on land.
myth.mythos.siren.guide.crafting.siren_e: The Siren Elixir can only be forged by a siren: place a water bottle and a nautilus shell into the smithing table. The elixir grants water breathing, swift swimming, and underwater vision for fifteen minutes.
myth.mythos.oni.description: A brutal demonic myth of war: it tears through melee combat, swells into a monstrous battle form, and forges rage talismans for other players.
myth.mythos.slime.description: A slime myth of shifting mass: it grows with inventory weight, changes combat stats by stage, ignores fall damage, brews sticky gel for wall climbing, and bursts into slime offspring when it dies.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.description: A shellbound myth of deep resonance: Wardens always drop Resonance Shards, the bearer gains 9 personal storage slots, and filling 37+ occupied slots causes an overloaded slow state.
myth.mythos.player.description: A hidden utility myth with no built-in strengths or weaknesses. Intended for manual customization through commands.
myth.mythos.oni.advantage.brutal_melee: Swords and axes deal 30% more damage.
myth.mythos.oni.advantage.battle_form: Can enter battle form for 3 minutes: 2.7-block height, +5 hearts, and full knockback resistance.
myth.mythos.oni.advantage.rage_talisman: Can forge a Rage Talisman: Strength III for 3 minutes, then Weakness I for 1 minute.
myth.mythos.slime.advantage.amorphous_bo: Its body is wrapped in a slime shell and changes mass with inventory load.
myth.mythos.slime.advantage.mass_stages: Each mass stage grants its own visible status, combat bonuses, and a different death-spawn outcome.
myth.mythos.slime.advantage.clinging_gel: Can craft Clinging Gel for wall climbing.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.advantage.extra_: Gains 9 personal slots as a separate 4th inventory row.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.advantage.shell_: Its shellcraft progression can bypass a direct End route later on.
myth.mythos.oni.disadvantage.ranged_weak: Bows and crossbows deal 30% less damage.
myth.mythos.oni.disadvantage.battle_form: Battle form ends with a heavy health backlash.
myth.mythos.slime.disadvantage.inventory: Its strength and size depend on how many inventory slots are occupied.
myth.mythos.slime.disadvantage.stage_tra: Small and huge forms trade mobility for power in different ways.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.disadvantage.war: Its progression only begins after killing a Warden.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.disadvantage.ove: At 37+ occupied slots, it gains Overloaded (Slowness I).
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.disadvantage.hea: Its key shulker upgrades remain expensive and late-game.
myth.mythos.oni.guide.feature.full_heigh: An oni keeps the standard player height of about 2 blocks until battle form is awakened.
myth.mythos.oni.guide.feature.brutal_mel: Swords and axes hit 30% harder in an oni's hands, but ranged weapons such as bows and crossbows are weakened by the same 30%.
myth.mythos.oni.guide.feature.battle_for: Press %s to awaken the oni battle form for 3 minutes: the body grows to 2.7 blocks tall, gains +5 extra hearts, and becomes fully resistant to knockback. After the form ends, it goes on a 10-minute cooldown.
myth.mythos.oni.guide.feature.enemy_sens: While battle form is active, nearby hostile creatures within 20 blocks begin to glow, making them easy to hunt even through walls.
myth.mythos.oni.guide.feature.battle_for: When battle form ends, the bonus hearts vanish and the oni suffers a heavy backlash worth roughly half of its remaining health. The backlash cannot kill on its own, but it can leave the oni in a very dangerous state.
myth.mythos.oni.guide.crafting.rage_tali: The Rage Talisman can only be forged by an oni: place paper and nether wart into the smithing table. Eating it grants Strength III for 3 minutes, then Weakness I for 1 minute. The talisman itself can only be used once every 4 minutes.
myth.mythos.slime.guide.feature.body: A slimeborn keeps the player's silhouette, but the body is surrounded by a translucent slime shell that becomes more imposing as mass increases.
myth.mythos.slime.guide.feature.stages: Occupied slots in the main inventory determine the mass stage: 0-9 small, 10-18 medium, 19-27 large, 28-36 huge. Form heights are 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, and 3.0 blocks respectively. The off-hand is not counted.
myth.mythos.slime.guide.feature.stage_st: Small: +35% movement speed, -25% melee damage, -4 armor, and -2 hearts; on death it creates 1 tiny slime. Medium: +10% movement speed and +2 armor; on death it creates 2 tiny slimes. Large: -10% movement speed, +30% melee damage, +4 armor, and +2 hearts; on death it creates 1 slime zombie. Huge: -20% movement speed, +45% melee damage, +8 armor, +4 hearts, and +80% knockback resistance; on death it creates 2 slime zombies. All forms are completely immune to fall damage.
myth.mythos.slime.guide.feature.clinging: While Clinging Gel is active, the player can crawl on walls. Pressing into a wall climbs upward, and holding Shift freezes in place on the surface.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.feature.fu: A shulkerborn keeps the standard height of about 2 blocks, without changing the base player model.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.feature.re: Every slain Warden always drops exactly 1 Resonance Shard. This is the shulkerborn's own rare resource and the starting point of its full progression path.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.feature.ex: Inside the personal inventory, the shulkerborn gains an extra 4th row of 9 dedicated slots. They are stored separately from the vanilla inventory and drop together with the rest of the inventory on death when keepInventory is disabled.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.feature.ov: If 37 or more slots are occupied in total, the shulkerborn becomes Overloaded: a custom movement slow equal in strength to Slowness I. It checks every 5 seconds and keeps a visible 20-second status.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.feature.sh: A shulkerborn is meant to follow a special shellcraft path instead of the normal End route. Later, these shards will open access to container upgrades and reinforced shulker storage.
myth.mythos.slime.guide.crafting.clingin: Clinging Gel is crafted in a crafting table from a Potion of Oozing and a Honey Block. It grants 5 minutes of wall climbing and can be used by any player.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.crafting.r: Resonance Shards are not crafted: every Warden always drops exactly 1. This is already the required core resource of the whole shellcraft branch.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.crafting.s: A shulkerborn can craft a normal shulker box before reaching the End by combining amethyst shards, slime, a chest, and a Warden's Resonance Shard.
myth.mythos.shulkerborn.guide.crafting.r: The Reinforced Shulker Box is a late upgrade made from two shulker boxes, two Resonance Shards, and a netherite ingot. It opens with double-chest capacity while staying a shulker-style container.
tooltip.mythos.elven_bow: Elven forging empowers drops from creatures slain with it.
tooltip.mythos.dwarven_pickaxe: Tempered with dwarven rune-work to raise ordinary enchantments by one level.
tooltip.mythos.dwarven_ale: Keeps a dwarf working for a full hour.
tooltip.mythos.fairy_boots: Fairy winds make every step lighter and quicker.
tooltip.mythos.fairy_minecart: This minecart does not obey the usual speed cap on powered rails.
tooltip.mythos.fox_lantern: Place the lantern to lure nearby hostile mobs toward it.
tooltip.mythos.siren_elixir: Grants water breathing, swift swimming, and deep vision for fifteen minutes.
tooltip.mythos.rage_talisman: Eat the talisman to gain Strength III for 3 minutes, then suffer Weakness I for 1 minute. Reuse: once every 4 minutes.
tooltip.mythos.clinging_gel: Grants 5 minutes of wall climbing and lets you freeze on walls while sneaking.
tooltip.mythos.resonance_shard: Wardens always drop 1 of these shards. It will anchor the shulkerborn shellcraft branch.
tooltip.mythos.myth_sphere: One-time item that clears your current myth and reopens myth selection.
tooltip.mythos.kitsune_tail_tuner.line1: Hold it to move the kitsune tail.
tooltip.mythos.kitsune_tail_tuner.line2: J/L = X, I/K = Y, U/O = Z, 7/9 = RX.
tooltip.mythos.kitsune_tail_tuner.line3: 4/6 = RY, 1/3 = RZ, [/] = step, P = reset, H = show.
tooltip.mythos.mythos_guide: Opens a guide to myths, their traits, and their unique crafting.
message.mythos.fairy_only_artifacts: Only a fairy can forge these artifacts.
message.mythos.fairy_vision_cooldown: Fairy vision will recover in %s sec.
message.mythos.kitsune_mask_night_only: Kitsune can wear the mask only at night.
message.mythos.kitsune_mask_day_visual: During the day, the mask and tails are visual only, without night powers.
message.mythos.kitsune_dash_cooldown: Fox dash will recover in %s sec.
message.mythos.kitsune_only_artifacts: Only a kitsune can forge these fox artifacts.
message.mythos.oni_only_artifacts: Only an oni can forge these battle talismans.
message.mythos.shulkerborn_only_artifact: Only a shulkerborn can assemble and recolor this shulker branch.
message.mythos.oni_battle_form_cooldown: Battle form will recover in %s sec.
message.mythos.slime_stage_small: Small mass: +35% speed, -25% damage, -4 armor, -2 hearts.
message.mythos.slime_stage_large: Dense mass: -10% speed, +30% damage, +4 armor, +2 hearts.
message.mythos.slime_stage_huge: Huge mass: -20% speed, +45% damage, +8 armor, +4 hearts, +80% knockback resistance.
message.mythos.siren_only_elixir: Only a siren can prepare the Siren Elixir.
message.mythos.siren_drying_out: The siren is drying out. Touch water or drink a water bottle quickly.
message.mythos.siren_water_restored: A water bottle restored your moisture.
gui.mythos.selection.title: Mythos
gui.mythos.guide.title: Tome of Mythos
gui.mythos.no_myths: There are no myths available yet.
